# Security Policy

CEOClaw is a closed-source product. This repository contains only **public documentation** — no source code, credentials, or internal systems.

## Reporting Vulnerabilities

If you discover sensitive information (credentials, API keys, private data) in this repository, please report it responsibly:

- **Email:** security@ceoclaw.com
- **GitHub:** [Report a vulnerability](../../security/advisories/new)

## What This Repository Contains

✅ Public documentation, screenshots, diagrams, and marketing materials
❌ No source code, API keys, database credentials, or internal tools

## Supported Versions

| Version | Documentation Status |
|---------|---------------------|
| 0.1.x   | ✅ Current            |
